title: onCleanup
description: Registers a cleanup function on the current reactive owner. Runs when the owner is disposed or before an effect re-runs.
param_fn_desc: Cleanup function. Called when the owner disposes.
returns_desc: The same function passed in, for convenience.
warning_no_owner: <0>onCleanup</0> called outside a <1>createRoot</1> or <2>render</2> will warn and the cleanup will never run.
